name: drift_review
description: Convention drift findings for a single project

repo.description: Affected repo (owner/name) or knowledge-base for stale_docs

convention_file.description: Convention filename only, e.g. 'repo-documentation.md', 'ansible-conventions.md'. Must match a filename from the conventions input.

convention_detail.description: Specific section or aspect within the convention that is violated

finding_key.description: Stable kebab-case slug identifying this specific check within the convention file. Must be deterministic — the same underlying problem must always produce the same key across runs. Examples: 'missing-repo-description', 'no-kb-link', 'template-markers', 'missing-stale-pr-workflow'.

expected.description: What the convention says should exist

summary.description: One paragraph overview of project convention health
